question_text: Which statement best describes a situation with balanced forces?

options.label: A
options.text: The object is always stationary and never moves

options.label: B
options.text: The net force is zero and the object either stays at rest or moves at constant velocity

options.label: C
options.text: All the forces acting on an object must be equal in size

options.label: D
options.text: The object will always accelerate in the direction of the largest force

explanation: Balanced forces result in zero net force. This means the object won't accelerate, but it can either be stationary or moving at a constant speed. The forces don't have to be equal in size overall—just the forces in opposite directions.
